answers: Basic smoothie formula: liquid base + fruit + greens + protein + healthy fat. Blend until smooth.
Healthy combos: banana+spinach+peanut butter, mango+yogurt+chia, berry+oat+almond milk, banana+cocoa+protein powder.
Smoothie tips: freeze fruit for thickness (no ice needed), add protein powder for satiety, and prep bags in advance.
Green smoothie: 1 banana + handful spinach + 1 cup almond milk + 1 tbsp peanut butter. Tastes like banana, not spinach!
